title: 10 best herbal creams for dry scalp
description: Artemisia absinthium, also known as wormwood, creams helps with dry scalp because of its antifungal and anti-inflammatory properties. The active compounds in wormwood cream, such as thujone and camphor, soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and flaking. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce redness and swelling, promoting a healthy scalp environment.
